title: DayAlert
description: Displays the current day number on your screen with a sound notification whenever a new day begins or you wake up from bed.
body:
**🌅 DayAlert**

DayAlert is a simple yet handy Minecraft mod that notifies you whenever a new day begins.

## Features

- 📅 Day counter display — Shows the current day number in the center of your screen at the start of each new day
- 🔔 Sound notification — Plays a subtle pling sound so you never miss a new day, even when focused on building or mining
- 🛏️ Bed support — Also triggers when you wake up from a bed, so you always know what day you're on
- ✨ Smooth fade effect — The day display fades in and out cleanly, keeping your UI uncluttered
- 🪶 Lightweight & client-side — No server installation required; works on any server you join

## Why DayAlert?

Losing track of days in Minecraft is surprisingly easy — especially on long sessions or multiplayer servers. DayAlert gives you a quick, non-intrusive reminder so you can plan around night cycles, mob spawning, and game events with ease.

All my mods are completely free to use.
If you'd like to support development, consider buying me a coffee!
